task_description: A network event at 11:51 UTC triggered an automatic failover in the 'auth-service' service. A bug in the failover logic left the service in a broken state with zero active connections.

commits.author: alice@company.com
commits.message: feat: fix edge case in rate limiter
commits.diff:
--- a/auth-service-service/rate_limiter.go
+++ b/auth-service-service/rate_limiter.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 10
+config.Timeout = 3 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load

infra_events.description: Network degradation detected on primary subnet. Packet loss 15%, latency spike 450ms. Triggered automatic failover procedures.
Routine az failover completed. No impact reported.
Routine az failover completed. No impact reported.
